Device identifier for the source system.
Timestamp of the event as recorded by the device.
Device name or hostname of the logging system.
Numeric type or category of the log event.
Priority or severity level of the log.
Software or firmware version of the component generating the log.
Module or subsystem name within the application.
Source IP address of the request or client.
User-Agent string identifying the client software.
Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; MSIE 9.0; Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; Trident/5.0; KB974487)
Action or operation being performed, useful for event correlation.
Numeric result code indicating success or failure of the action.
Display message summarizing the action outcome in a human-readable form.
Flag indicating whether the log entry pertains to firewall logging.
Indicator of successful operation, extracted from the nested payload in the msg field.
Duration of the session in seconds, extracted from the nested payload in the msg field.
